title: Viners Barware Double Deluxe Dual Spirit Measure Cocktail Jigger | Brushed Stainless Steel, 60ml/30ml
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our modern double jigger is essential for measuring accurately when making cocktail drinks or serving spirits when entertaining. Elegant and expertly crafted, making it the perfect gift for any occasion

YOUR SERVING PLEASURE | Designed with you in mind, this double cocktail jigger is comfortable to hold and use allowing an easy pour without slippage. It features both single 30ml capacity and double 60ml capacity measures, ideal for pouring like a true bartender

MADE TO LAST | This alcohol measure is made to last, made from durable stainless steel with a brushed steel finish. Avoid abrasive sponges on this tot measure. Dishwasher safe and wash before first use

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and wine buckets

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Glass Cocktail Shaker Silver Cocktail Shaker Spirit Pourer Gift Set Cocktail Mixing Spoon Cocktail Strainer Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 8 3.9 out of 5 stars 43 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £14.95 £ 14 . 95 £7.39 £ 7 . 39 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £1.93 £ 1 . 93 £6.30 £ 6 . 30 Description Perfect your mixology skills with this sophisticated cocktail shaker. Made from durable, heavy weight glass with a decorative, linear cut design. The ideal size for a single cocktail drink serving. This classic shaped cocktail shaker with a brushed steel finish features an airtight lid with integral strainer - perfect for preparing creative cocktails at home. A pair of versatile pouring spouts that fit a variety of bottle necks. Suitable for measuring spirits, syrups and oils - perfect for preparing creative cocktails or food at home. Professionally mix your favourite cocktail with this mixing spoon. Upside down, using the flat end and twisted handle, you can layer spirits to create stacked cocktails and drinks in tall glasses. Sieve your drinks and keep them smooth with this Hawthorne style cocktail strainer. It filters out ice, garnish and fruit pieces, and the springs expand to fit over different sized glasses or shakers. It has a hanging hole for neat storage.
